sources.title: ROS 2 Rolling: URDF tutorials
sources.license: Use according to the upstream documentation and repository terms; no upstream content is copied here.
sources.use: Reference for robot links, joints, visual and collision geometry, inertial properties, and URDF export validation.

sources.title: ROS 2 Control: Joint Kinematics for ros2_control
sources.license: Use according to the upstream documentation and repository terms; no upstream content is copied here.
sources.use: Reference for serial-chain modelling and the limitations of URDF mimic joints for coupled mechanisms.

sources.title: HIWIN MG Series miniature linear guideways
sources.license: Vendor catalogue and drawings remain subject to HIWIN terms; no drawings or tables are stored here.
sources.use: Candidate family reference for compact linear-guide selection. Use the exact current model drawing and catalogue for dimensions, load ratings, preload, accuracy, lubrication, and mounting data.

sources.title: Gates PowerGrip GT3 belts
sources.license: Vendor catalogue and design tools are subject to Gates terms; no catalogue tables are stored here.
sources.use: Candidate family reference for synchronous-belt drive selection and supplier-specific sizing workflow.

sources.title: Oriental Motor PKP Series 56.4 mm / NEMA 23 stepper motors
sources.license: Vendor catalogue and drawings are subject to Oriental Motor terms; no drawings or tables are stored here.
sources.use: Candidate-family reference only. An exact motor, driver, encoder/brake option, mounting drawing, speed-torque curve, and electrical data are required before design release.

sources.title: Harmonic Drive CSG-17-100-2A-R component set
sources.license: Vendor product data and drawings are subject to Harmonic Drive terms; concise metadata only is stored here.
sources.use: Source-specific candidate record for a compact strain-wave actuator concept. Verify the current drawing, operating limits, bearing loads, life, lubrication, mounting, and integration conditions with Harmonic Drive before use.

sources.title: ISO 9283:1998, Manipulating industrial robots — Performance criteria and related test methods
sources.license: Licensed standard; metadata only is stored here. Obtain authorized access before applying requirements or test methods.
sources.use: Future reference for robot performance terminology and validation planning after qualified engineering review.

sources.title: ISO 10218-1:2025, Robots and robotic devices — Safety requirements for industrial robots
sources.license: Licensed standard; metadata only is stored here. It is not embedded or interpreted as a compliance rule.
sources.use: Safety-governance reference. A qualified safety and controls review is required for any real deployment.
